title: Kit Sorter
description: A mod intended for geopol/faction servers, that sorts "sets" into large storageges automatically.
body:
# Kit sorter

_Originally made for Vinovians only, now public for everyone to use._

A kit sorting mod for geopol/faction servers that sorts "sets" into your chests/barrels for you, so you can get back to PVP.

### How do I use it ?
1. Using [Cloth config's](https://modrinth.com/project/9s6osm5g) menu you can define what items are part of your "sets" (usually full armour + weapons)
2. You go into your storage room and press the "sort items" bind.
3. Watch as the mod opens every container around you and depositis the set items into the container from your inventory. "neat"

Optionally you can:
- Stop the mod from sorting into specific container types (ie: hoppers, barrels etc.)
- Define the boundaries of your storage room so it doesnt sort items into random nearby chests
- Set the speed at which it moves items/opens containers so that the server doesnt accidentlally kick you
- Tell it to sort sets **horizontally** instead o vertically 

**Obligatory warning: Some servers may consider this "cheating" use at your own disgression**
